title: PQ-REACT — Post-Quantum Cryptography Framework for Energy Aware Contexts (project listing)
summary: Entry in the Greek Ministry of Digital Governance observatory registry listing the PQ-REACT (Post-Quantum Cryptography Framework for Energy Aware Contexts) project, an EU-funded (CEF) initiative on post-quantum cryptography.

title: Greece at the forefront of quantum communications in Europe
summary: Greek Ministry of Digital Governance news item on two highly-rated European proposals placing Greece at the forefront of quantum communications. Domestic and institutional, but the title/description reference quantum communications (QKD) rather than an explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography migration; flagged for human review to confirm a PQC reference.

title: HellasQCI invites participation in the EU public consultation on PQC (NIS Cooperation Group)
summary: HellasQCI, the Greek national quantum communication infrastructure consortium (part of EuroQCI), invites participation in an EU public consultation, stating that the transition to quantum-resistant cryptography (PQC and QKD) is essential to protect Greece's and Europe's critical infrastructures. Domestic funded consortium with an explicit PQC reference; not on the trusted-domain list, so flagged for human review.

title: Εθνική Στρατηγική Κυβερνοασφάλειας 2026–2030 (National Cybersecurity Strategy 2026-2030)
issuingOrg: Ministry of Digital Governance / National Cybersecurity Authority (EAK)
summary: Greece's new five-year National Cybersecurity Strategy (protocol 2563/16.12.2025), issued by the Ministry of Digital Governance / National Cybersecurity Authority, which explicitly frames the transition to post-quantum cryptography (μετα-κβαντική κρυπτογραφία) as a matter of strategic importance for EU member states including Greece. It is the successor to the National Cyber Security Strategy 2020-2025.

title: Q-PrEP 2026: Quantum Readiness in Practice — first cybersecurity workshop for the quantum era at Demokritos
summary: Announcement by the Greek National Cybersecurity Authority (EAK), with the Demokritos quantum institute, of the first national quantum-era cybersecurity workshop (3-5 Feb 2026), explicitly centred on the transition to Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) infrastructures.
